description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lint that runs on every push to any branch and on every pull request to any branch. The workflow consists of three jobs: check-remove-before-flight, check-cpp, and check-iwyu, all running on windows-latest. The check-remove-before-flight job checks for a specific string in the source tree and reports errors. The check-cpp job downloads cpplint, runs it on C++ files changed by the pull request or all C++ files otherwise, and reports warnings. The check-iwyu job restores the Release configuration, builds sourcerer, and runs include_what_you_using_all_the_things.ps1 to check for IWYU warnings.
